eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Kerr, TX; at 4:24 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 4:39 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: City of Kerrville Emergency Operations Center. Residents living along Quinlan Creek should evacuate to higher ground. All other city resident shelter in place. Local roads are still flooded and dangerous for travel. Follow City of Kerrville Facebook page for more information.
